notes: Unresolvable district scopes (no queryable official boundary): COUNTY_COUNCIL. Contests/measures scoped to them are hidden rather than shown to the wrong voters.

measures.jurisdiction: Asotin County Rural EMS District No. 2
measures.title: Emergency Medical Services Levy
measures.what_it_does: Increases the rural EMS district's regular levy to fund emergency medical services for six years starting in 2027.
measures.cost_line: Up to $0.28 per $1,000 of assessed value (up from $0.15).

taxes.basis: YES approves a local tax, levy, bond, or annexation measure for the listed public service.

measures.title: Emergency Medical Services Excess Levy
measures.what_it_does: Authorizes a one-year excess property tax levy to fund emergency medical services in Clarkston.
measures.cost_line: $1,217,828 for collection in 2027, approximately $1.64 per $1,000 of assessed value.

taxes.basis: YES approves a local tax, levy, bond, or annexation measure for the listed public service.
